pi_items.source: Task input parameter specified in task.json. This is a synthetic input value for the calculator.
Task input parameter specified in task.json. This is a synthetic input value for the calculator.

Verified through battery charging time formula: Time = Capacity/(Current * Efficiency). For 200 Ah at 25 A with 85% efficiency: 200/(25*0.85) = 9.41 hours. With 90% efficiency: 8.89 hours. All calculated values fall within the stated range. The minimum of 7.5 hours represents a conservative estimate accounting for potential efficiency variations.

Verified through battery charging time formula. The maximum of 11.5 hours represents a conservative estimate accounting for efficiency variations and potential charging inefficiencies. For the given inputs (200 Ah at 25 A), typical efficiency scenarios yield 8-9.4 hours, all within this range.
Verified in task.json description (line 6) and export_result.sh (line 7). This is the expected output location for the task.
Verified in task.json description (line 7) and export_result.sh (line 8). This is the expected screenshot location for the task.

pi_items.metadata_value: Implied by task.json description: 'Open the Battery Charging Time calculator (usually under Battery section)'
pi_items.source: Web search of HSN Electrical Calculations app changelog (https://www.egalnetsoftwares.com/apps/electrical_calculations/android_changelog/) shows battery-related features include: Battery Life calculator (v2.0.0), Peukert's coefficient enhancement (v2.4.3), and Depth of Discharge feature (v7.9.2). NO mention of Battery Charging Time calculator found in official changelog or multiple app description sources.

privileged_info_summary: The battery charging time calculation for 200 Ah at 25 A is expected to yield 8-9.4 hours depending on efficiency assumptions (85-90%). The expected range of 7.5-11.5 hours is appropriate and accounts for efficiency variations. The input parameters (200 Ah capacity, 25 A current) are synthetic test values. The expected output files (/sdcard/tasks/charge_time_result.txt and /sdcard/tasks/charge_time_screenshot.png) match the export script configurations. However, the HSN Electrical Calculations app's official changelog does not document a Battery Charging Time calculator; the app contains Battery Life calculations but not battery charging time computations.
